title: Quick Guide - Translations
scenario: Quick Guide translations are incorrect or missing across supported languages in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Navigate to Account → Settings → Language and select a supported language.
3. Restart the app if required, then go through the entire Quick Guide flow (from Home → Quick Guide or Account → Quick Guide).
4. Verify that all text elements (headings, body text, button labels, tooltips) are properly translated and displayed without truncation, placeholder text, or untranslated strings.
5. Repeat steps 2–4 for each supported language available in the app.
expected: All Quick Guide text is properly translated and displayed in the selected language, with no untranslated strings, placeholders, or formatting issues.
